node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"զսքանչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104247937","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104247937","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-104b"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"},"M7032":{"lit":"զսքանչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104007008","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104007008","n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-082b"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"},"M8293":{"lit":"զսք<lb xml:id=\"l104380602\" facs=\"#z104380602\" n=\"4\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>անչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104380604","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104380604","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8293.0065b"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"},"M6712":{"lit":"զսքա<lb xml:id=\"l104398307\" facs=\"#z104398307\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104398306","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104398306","n":"15"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-145a"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"},"M9307":{"lit":"զսքանչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104217301","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104217301","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-154a"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"},"M8502":{"lit":"զսքանչելիսն","line":{"facs":"#z104141330","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104141330","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8502-099a"},"n":"զսքանչելիսն"}}
